parameters: \SE[18]Yeah, yeah...! You're so loud...! You know...! What time do you think it is...!

Ahaha... Long time no see, Elly. Sorry for coming home so late at night like
this......
完了までウェイト = true
完了までウェイト = true

That became my last adventure... I barely left the village and almost got killed by a
monster... Getting saved by a girl I used to bully is such a lame way to go...

Someone like me could never be the protagonist of a story... There's no way I could
stand beside those two... That's right... A place like this suits me just
fine.........
skit pose エリィ t normal 17

parameters.name: misc/Standard Door, Jimmy, Knock, Rattle F

parameters: 完了までウェイト = true

Tch...! What is it, coming here in the middle of the night...! Ugh... I was having
such a nice dream for once...! Give me back Mana-chan's lap pillow...!

\SE[19]...Hah, that bastard...! Who would've thought he'd come visiting at this hour...!
Just how much excess energy does that idiot have...!

\SE[8].........Just get out already. It'll be a nuisance to the neighbors if you stay like
this... .........If I just get you off once, you'll calm down, right...

\SE[17]A shelf lined with dishes for two... How long must I wait before I'm allowed to use
the other set...?

\SE[23]If I don't leave it here, I'll be in trouble when that idiot barges in... If our eyes
meet while I'm doing it, it's kind of awkward... It feels like I'm being watched by
my big brother, and I can't stay calm...

\SE[10]Mixed in with my handmade clothes, there's a set of clothes that bastard forced on
me! Who would ever wear such a revealing outfit! The skirt's too short, and the chest
is way too open...!

\SE[11]I'm glad I bought one that fits his size... That idiot tries to go raw if there's no
condom... ...Wait, why do I have to be the one to prepare it...!?

\SE[23]Onii-san's bookshelf is almost empty... He said to return the books I borrowed to the
Village Chief, so I took them back... I wanted to leave them as they were, but
there's nothing I can do...

\SE[23]Onii-chan's few sets of clothes all went off on the adventure... I was always the one
washing them for you. Onii-chan, are you washing them properly yourself while
traveling...?

\SE[8]The sewing and cleaning supplies keep getting pushed further back... Now all that's
left up front is lube and condoms... Every time that guy comes to the room, it's just
more of this stuff.

You're so good with your hands, Elly-chan... I'm jealous of your sewing skills...
It's so different from me~...

But I still have it, that... scarf Mana hand-knitted for my birthday a long time ago.
It was fluffy and warm.

It's all tattered and the stitches are a mess, see! Look, \n[1]...! Look forward to
this year's present! I'll show you my current masterpiece, the best I can do!
But, I've been busy lately... Sorry if it's not ready in time.
マップイベント呼び出し
イベントID(もしくは名称) = 14

\SE[23]I guess I don't feel motivated to cook if there's no one to eat it... I only realized
that after you were gone, onii-chan. I... I guess I didn't really like cooking that
much after all.
\SE[23]Onii-chan's bed... I always keep it clean and tidy, so you can come back anytime...

\SE[23]My bed still holds a bit of warmth... Hah... If I just burrow back under the covers
now, I wonder if I could see Mana-chan again...

\SE[7]...Ugh, gross! I can't just leave that bastard's trash lying around here forever...
...Ugh...sniff, sniff...

\SE[20]This flower... Onii-chan said our mother really liked it. But, to be honest... I
don't really care about that sort of thing... It's just that Onii-chan's face looked
a little lonely when he said it.........

\SE[23]I'm not interested in flowers at all... ...If Onii-chan isn't coming back,
then.........
